name_en: Prada latest spring/summer runway Re-Edition 2005. Imported cowhide paired with high-end 24k gold hardware. Golden yellow and stunning. Check the details and the hardware. 2274, 33cm x 24cm x 12cm. The most value-for-money classic handbag in the market. You won't go wrong choosing this.
